Log \#14  
Prompt:  
Take this application and make the following changes: The symbols inside the reel cards are not centered correctly on all screen sizes ((desktop, tablet, and mobile down to 375px wide) (this issue is high priority, please fix that). Please write comments per each function as well. When the player clicks Spin, the symbols just instantly swap to the new result; there is no rolling/spinning animation. Add a vertical scroll animation to each reel. Make sure the reel animates with symbols scrolling downward (like a drum rolling). The animation starts fast and slows down before stopping reels stop one by one left reel stops first , middle after, and then the right

Observations:   
**🎯 Iteration 14 — What changed**

### **🎰 Spin Animation (Big Upgrade)**

* **Reel spinning now uses easing (slow down effect)**  
  * Starts fast → slows before stopping  
* Replaced simple interval with **requestAnimationFrame-based animation**

---

### **🎨 Visual Animation Improvement**

* **Symbol animation changed**  
  * New “scrolling” motion instead of simple shake  
* Feels more like real slot reels

---

### **🧼 Code Quality**

* **Major comments \+ documentation added**  
  * Functions now clearly explained (JSDoc style)  
* Better structure / readability

---

## **⚡ Net Effect**

* Spins feel **more realistic \+ polished**  
* Codebase becomes **cleaner and easier to maintain**  
* No gameplay changes, just **animation \+ dev quality upgrade**

Validation:  
   
No HTML or CSS errors

Visual: 

![][image1]

Improvements: 

* Fix the flexing of the 5 reel slot  
* Add more detailed comments about the code and look for repetitive/unnecessary lines of code to remove  
* Add a log that keeps track of the results of the last 5 spins so that players can track their progress  
* Add visual and audio of fanfare to signal victory/win

New Prompt Brainstorming:   
Take this application and make the following changes: in the big 5-reel game mode, make it so that the emojis are not squished vertically and flexes with the size of the reel. Please add more descriptive comments that give the programmer insight into how the function works. Look out for redundant code and clean it up if possible. Additionally, incorporate a log that keeps track of the last 5 spins run and their results to allow for players to keep track of a portion of their current progress. Include visual and auditorial fanfare to winning results to communicate the impact of the win achieved by the player, specifically in winning a three or five symbol match.
